'''Koa Ne''' was the [[Prime Minister (Kamino)|Prime Minister]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. He met with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to discuss [[Taun We/Legends|Taun We's]] whereabouts and the [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] information she had stolen after she fled [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]]. Ne tried to hire Boba to track down Taun We and bring her and the information to Kamino, but failed to meet Fett's price.<ref name="Bloodlines" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{C|Text-comm message only}}
